{{Infobox group
| name = Deep Eye School
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Deep Eye School]] is a small sect of earth artists located in the mountains at the southern edge of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Deep Eye School]] consists of earth artists who sculpt stone.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Deep [[Eye]] disciples train by examining the [[aura]] of rocks and boulders.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
